notes: v0.24.5 — Lobby fixes: boss picker tiles regain their per-boss animations (CIRCLE rings, PRISM beams, HIVE swarm, SNAKE serpent) via _make_boss_hero_scene_script; SOON tiles still animate under a dim wash + corner SOON chip. Boss picker row moved to the same vertical offset as PRACTICE/MULTIPLAYER/BOSS RUSH so cards don't jump. Daily Challenge prints only the real PULSE reward (no fake +500 XP / +1 SURGE). Module strip removed from under the ship card; ship + orbit + click hint use the full card. Trio gap widened 8→28 px so party + YOU read as independent panels.
